summary: L1 & L2 League Features Testing Complete - All 15 backend tests PASSED, All UI tests PASSED. L1: Dashboard shows 5 clickable league KPIs (Totale, Nazionale, Private Custom, Private Naz., A Rischio) with type-based navigation. L2: Control Room modal with 3 tabs working correctly - Info & Regole shows scoring table, Modifica tab has editable name field + all league settings + ATTENZIONE warning, Team tab shows owner/members with transfer/promote actions.

l1_dashboard_kpis.nazionale_kpi: PASS - Shows national_count (1), clickable, navigates with type=national filter
l1_dashboard_kpis.private_custom_kpi: PASS - Shows private_custom_count (38), clickable, navigates with type=private_custom filter
l1_dashboard_kpis.a_rischio_kpi: PASS - Shows at_risk count (7), clickable, navigates with risk=all filter

l2_control_room.control_room_button: PASS - Each league row has 'Control Room' button
l2_control_room.three_tabs: PASS - Modal has Info & Regole, Modifica, Team & Admin tabs
l2_control_room.info_tab_content: PASS - Shows ID, season, matchday range, deadline, match source, championship predictions, members, owner, invite code, created date + scoring table
l2_control_room.modifica_tab_attenzione: PASS - Shows red ATTENZIONE warning box
l2_control_room.modifica_tab_name_field: PASS - Editable 'Nome Lega' input field present
l2_control_room.modifica_tab_markets: PASS - 4 market checkboxes (1X2, Over/Under, Goal/No Goal, Risultato Esatto) with points inputs
l2_control_room.modifica_tab_deadline: PASS - 'Minuti prima del fischio d'inizio' input present
l2_control_room.team_tab_owner: PASS - Shows OWNER section with owner info
l2_control_room.team_tab_transfer: PASS - Transfer ownership dropdown + 'Trasferisci' button for super admin
l2_control_room.team_tab_members_table: PASS - Members table with Username, Email, Ruolo, Azioni columns
l2_control_room.admin_count_click: PASS - Clicking admin count in leagues table opens Control Room on Team tab

l2_edit_rules_api.accepts_name_field: PASS - API accepts and updates 'name' field
l2_edit_rules_api.updates_deadline_championship: PASS - Can update bet_deadline_minutes and include_championship_predictions

access_control.non_admin_denied_dashboard: PASS - Non-admin users denied access to dashboard stats (403)
access_control.non_super_admin_denied_edit: PASS - Non-super-admin users denied edit rules access (403)

verified_features: L1: Dashboard shows 5 league KPIs: Totale (58), Nazionale (1), Private Custom (38), Private Naz. (19), A Rischio (7)
L1: All 5 KPIs are clickable with cursor:pointer styling
L1: Clicking 'Nazionale' KPI navigates to leagues page with type filter set to 'national'
L1: Clicking 'Private Custom' KPI navigates to leagues page with type filter set to 'private_custom'
L1: Clicking 'Private Naz.' KPI navigates to leagues page with type filter set to 'private_national'
L1: Clicking 'A Rischio' KPI navigates to leagues page with risk filter set to 'all'
L1: GET /api/rbac/dashboard-stats returns national_count, private_custom_count, private_national_count fields
L1: League counts sum validates: national + private_custom + private_national = total
L2: Each league row has a 'Control Room' button (replaced old Dettaglio/Gestisci buttons)
L2: Control Room modal has 3 tabs: 'Info & Regole', 'Modifica', 'Team & Admin'
L2: Info tab shows complete league details grid (ID, season, matchday range, deadline, source, championship, members, owner, invite code, created)
L2: Info tab shows 'Mercati e Punteggi' scoring table with Mercato/Stato/Punti columns
L2: Modifica tab shows red ATTENZIONE warning box
L2: Modifica tab has editable 'Nome Lega' input field (new feature)
L2: Modifica tab has 4 market checkboxes with points inputs
L2: Modifica tab has Giornata Inizio/Fine range inputs
L2: Modifica tab has deadline minutes input
L2: Modifica tab has championship predictions dropdown
L2: Modifica tab has 'Salva Tutte le Modifiche' button
L2: Team tab shows OWNER section with owner username/email
L2: Team tab has transfer ownership dropdown for super admin
L2: Team tab shows members table with promote/remove admin actions
L2: PUT /api/rbac/leagues/{id}/rules accepts 'name' field
L2: Name validation: minimum 2 characters, maximum 60 characters
L2: Clicking admin count in leagues table opens Control Room on Team tab
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats API correctly calculates national_count, private_custom_count, private_national_count
Edit rules API properly validates name field (2-60 chars) before updating
Control Room tabs use data-testid attributes: cr-tab-info, cr-tab-edit, cr-tab-team
Name edit field uses id='rule-name' with data-testid='edit-league-name'
All edit fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing leagues for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: L1 & L2 league features fully tested and working. Dashboard shows 5 clickable league KPIs. Control Room modal replaces old Dettaglio/Gestisci buttons with unified 3-tab interface. Edit tab now includes Name field with validation. Team tab shows owner management and member admin controls. showLeagueManage and showLeagueDetail functions now redirect to showLeagueControlRoom.
